race.comment: BONCAPO (4) charged home late to just miss two runs back over 1400m at this track. Struggled a little when asked to step up to 1750m at Muswellbrook last start. Very fit after three runs back from a spell and is perfectly placed back to the mile. FIERCE LUVA (5) returned from a six-month spell and was lining up for only the second time when an eye-catching second over 1400m at Dubbo eight days ago, making up many lengths in the run home. Sure to prove tough to hold out over the extra 200m with a run under the belt. Big gap then to SNOW DOG (3) who did a good job to get up for second over this trip at Narromine two back. Poor effort subsequently at the picnics is cause for concern. Exotics only. THE MAILER (7) did a great job to come from a mile back to win his maiden two runs ago at Dubbo. Poor last start at Scone but deserves another chance. NORTHERN EXPOSURE (1) didn't run a strong 1750m at Muswellbrook last time out but can improve coming back in trip.
